notes: Le Chat is Mistral AI's consumer chatbot, a French pun since "chat" means both "chat" and "cat," which went viral in France in early 2025. Say it the French way, luh SHAH: the final t is silent and "ch" is /ʃ/ (like English "sh"). Wikipedia gives strict French /lə ʃa/; American speakers naturally render the vowel as "shah" /ʃɑ/. English devs commonly mangle it as "lee chat" or "luh CHAT" with a hard English "ch" and an audible t. Non-obvious because the spelling looks like the English word "chat," but it is French. (Mistral renamed the app Vibe at the end of May 2026.)
